meaning: n.[罗神]福耳图那(命运女神)
examples: In the finished film, this senatorial "Fortuna" did not appear on screen.
Fortuna escaped the destruction of the sail barge in a small private skiff.
My dear friends: in this New Year wishes God bless you! Fortuna clinging to you!
Fortuna Silver Mines Inc shares are currently trading down about 6.3% on the day.
Past La Fortuna, the paved road hugs the north bank of Laguna de Arenal.
